title: lagopus montanus
intro: Lagopus montanus, also known as Mountain Arbutus, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lagopus montanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
